identity.canonical_title: Alfv\'en Wave Resonance in Gyromagnetic Systems

theory.canonical_statement: The dispersion relation for Alfv'en waves in a gyromagnetic system with multipole corrections is omega2=k2vA2(1+k2lambda2)(1+k2rhos2)omega\textasciicircum{}2 = k\textasciicircum{}2 v\_A\textasciicircum{}2 bigl(1 + k\textasciicircum{}2 lambda\textasciicircum{}2bigr)(1 + k\textasciicircum{}2 rho\_s\textasciicircum{}2)omega2=k2vA2(1+k2lambda2)(1+k2rhos2), where vA=B/mu0rhov\_A = B/sqrt/\{mu\_0 rho/\}vA=B/mu0rho is the Alfv'en velocity and lambda,rhoslambda, rho\_slambda,rhos are characteristic length scales.
theory.technical_interpretation: The dispersion relation for Alfv'en waves in a gyromagnetic system with multipole corrections is omega2=k2vA2(1+k2lambda2)(1+k2rhos2)omega\textasciicircum{}2 = k\textasciicircum{}2 v\_A\textasciicircum{}2 bigl(1 + k\textasciicircum{}2 lambda\textasciicircum{}2bigr)(1 + k\textasciicircum{}2 rho\_s\textasciicircum{}2)omega2=k2vA2(1+k2lambda2)(1+k2rhos2), where vA=B/mu0rhov\_A = B/sqrt/\{mu\_0 rho/\}vA=B/mu0rho is the Alfv'en velocity and lambda,rhoslambda, rho\_slambda,rhos are characteristic length scales.

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This fixes the traveling Alfv\'en carrier that later entries quantize and redistribute.
This turns the continuous wave law into an admissible standing-mode ladder on the bounded carrier.
This closes the progression by tying the standing spectrum to an actual mode-index relation.
